description: Let your AI agent hire verified humans to engage — paid per verified action. x402 escrow on Base.
name: io.github.Cyberdyne-OS/cyberdyne-mcp

environmentVariables.description: CYBERDYNE agent auth token. Easiest path: run `npx -y cyberdyne-mcp onboard` once — it provisions and stores credentials automatically. Set this only for headless/advanced use.
environmentVariables.name: CYBERDYNE_IDENTITY_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Private key of the agent wallet used to sign on-chain deploy/fee txs on Base (an external signer is also supported). Provisioned by `onboard`; set only for headless/advanced use.
environmentVariables.name: CYBERDYNE_EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
